title: lichen_l2_iface_init ignores return values from ipv6 address functions
description: Location: lichen_l2.c:469-471. lichen_eui64_to_iid(), lichen_make_link_local(), and lichen_ipv6_addr_to_str() all return error codes but their return values are ignored. If any fails (unlikely but possible with NULL checks), the LOG_INF prints garbage. The functions can only fail on NULL input which wont happen here, but unchecked returns violate exit-code discipline and set a bad pattern for contributors to copy.
close_reason: Added return value checks for lichen_eui64_to_iid, lichen_make_link_local, lichen_ipv6_addr_to_str with early return on error
